questionHtml: Determine whether foraging by crabs is dependent on number of prey (mussels) or number of predators (crabs).
markschemeHtml:
a. «foraging» depends on number of predators/crabs ✔

b. mean number of mussels/prey consumed per crab decreases as number of crabs increases ✔ Accept vice versa.

c. crabs compete for prey/mussels ✔

d. both «prey and predator» affect foraging success ✔

meta.title: Determine whether foraging by crabs is dependent on number of prey (mussels) or number of predators (crabs).
